title: Home Builder Helper: Phase 1 - Discovery & Planning
description:
**PROJECT:** Home Builder Helper
**PHASE:** 1 - Discovery & Planning

**OBJECTIVE:** Establish product foundation through requirements gathering, user research, and feature prioritization.

**DELIVERABLES:**
1. User personas (3-5 homeowner archetypes)
2. User journey map (planning → construction → completion)
3. Feature priority list (MVP scope)
4. Requirements specification
5. High-level timeline estimate

**SCOPE:**
- Homeowner uses app during new house construction
- Two main phases: Physical construction + Design decisions
- Upload design plans OR answer intake form questions
- Keep build organized and on schedule

**SUCCESS CRITERIA:**
✅ Clear user research documented
✅ MVP features defined (<15 core features)
✅ Technical approach identified
✅ Timeline estimate: 4-6 weeks to MVP

**LEVEL:** 2 (Execute Immediately)
**PROJECT ID:** 8
**PROJECT NAME:** Home Builder Helper

This is the foundation work. Get this right before design/dev begins.
note: Reset from stale executing - needs real execution

title: Home Builder Helper: Phase 2 - Design & Wireframes
description:
**PROJECT:** Home Builder Helper
**PHASE:** 2 - Design & Wireframes
**OWNER:** Johnny (Design Lead)

**OBJECTIVE:** Create UX/UI design foundation using discovered user personas and journeys.

**INPUTS (From Phase 1):**
- 5 user personas with pain points
- 4-phase user journey map
- 10 P0 features for MVP
- Tech stack: React Native + Supabase

**DELIVERABLES:**
1. Design system (component library, colors, typography)
2. Wireframes for all 10 MVP features
3. Key user flows (first-time setup, add selection, track budget)
4. Mobile-first mockups (iPhone 14 Pro size)
5. Design spec document (handoff-ready for development)

**SCOPE:**
Focus on the core user journey: Home Owner opens app → sees dashboard → manages selections/budget → tracks inspections → gets insights.

Design for 5 user personas:
- First-Timer Fiona (needs guidance, hand-holding)
- Budget-Conscious Brad (cost visibility paramount)
- Luxury Linda (complex customization)
- Tech-Savvy Tyler (data/automation)
- Large Family Larry (collaboration/shared views)

**SUCCESS CRITERIA:**
✅ Component system defined + reusable
✅ All 10 MVP screens wireframed + annotated
✅ User flows clear (onboarding → core tasks)
✅ Mobile-friendly (not just responsive)
✅ Design spec ready for handoff to development

**TIMELINE:** Target 3-4 days (Phase 2 of 5)
**NEXT PHASE:** Development (Jarvis will build from your spec)

**LEVEL:** 2 (Execute Immediately)
**PROJECT ID:** 8
**PROJECT NAME:** Home Builder Helper
note: Reset from stale executing - needs real execution

title: Home Builder Helper: Phase 3 - Development
description:
**PHASE:** 3 - Full Stack Development
**OWNER:** Jarvis (Lead Developer)

Build the MVP with 10 P0 features. Tech: React Native + Supabase backend.

**INPUTS:** Design spec from Johnny (Phase 2)
**DELIVERABLES:** 
- Functional app (all 10 MVP features)
- Auth + user management
- Data sync (Supabase)
- Offline support
- Ready for QA/beta testing

**TIMELINE:** 2 weeks from Phase 2 start
**NEXT:** QA with Velma

title: Home Builder Helper: Phase 4 - Testing & QA
description:
**PHASE:** 4 - Quality Assurance & Testing
**OWNER:** Velma (QA Lead)

Test all 10 MVP features, find bugs, verify against personas.

**INPUTS:** Working app from Jarvis (Phase 3)
**DELIVERABLES:**
- Test plan executed
- Bugs logged + fixed
- Beta-ready app
- Release notes

**TIMELINE:** 1 week
**NEXT:** Launch & Iterate
